description: The LabelContentDriver Component is used to handle driving and updating the visual of labels placed by a Labeler Tool.

fields.AutoUpdate: Automatically update the visual per tick
fields.Padding: How much padding this label should have from the label's text content.
fields.BaseWidth: The width of the underline for the text attached to the label.
fields.ContentOrientSpace: How to orient the text content of this label.
fields.OrientAtLocalUser: Whether to look at the local user (usually true)
fields._contentRoot: The root of the text content for the label this is driving.
fields._targetPoint: The target point of the line coming from the underline for the label this is driving.
fields._contentRotation: The rotation of the content of the label this is driving.
fields._contentRotationDrive: The rotation field of the content.
fields._labelPosition: The position field of the label.
fields._labelWidth: The length field of the label underline.
fields._lineWidth: The width field of the line for the label.
fields._labelRotation: The rotation field of the label.
fields._pointPosition: The target point field for what the label is pointing to.

usage: Not used directly by the user. Used in the Labeler Tool.
